diff --git a/.project-roadmap/issues-db/upstream/2217.json b/.project-roadmap/issues-db/upstream/2217.json
index 54482cc8d..9b84418d5 100644
--- a/.project-roadmap/issues-db/upstream/2217.json
+++ b/.project-roadmap/issues-db/upstream/2217.json
@@ -8,12 +8,19 @@
   "created_at": "2022-05-03T15:33:56Z",
   "github_updated_at": "2022-05-04T06:07:31Z",
   "body_snippet": "# Remote Desktop Gateway Password\r\n\r\nI have hundreds of servers configured on my mRemoteNG app, and we use gateway credentials.\r\nWhen I have to change my LDAP user password, it is a big headache since I have to change the gateway password for each server.\r\n\r\nIf I export the configuration to a XML file I cannot see an option to change the gateway password.\r\nIs there a way to change the gateway password for all servers at once?\r\n\r\nThanks.\r\n",
-  "our_status": "new",
-  "priority": null,
+  "our_status": "triaged",
+  "priority": "P2-bug",
   "target_release": null,
   "our_branch": null,
   "our_pr": null,
-  "iterations": [],
+  "iterations": [
+    {
+      "seq": 1,
+      "date": "2026-02-23",
+      "type": "triaged",
+      "description": "The issue likely concerns a bug in the handling, storage, or utilization of the Remote Desktop Gateway password during connection establishment or configuration management."
+    }
+  ],
   "comments": [
     {
       "id": "IC_kwDOAAcIMM5Ck3CT",
@@ -30,5 +37,5 @@
   "needs_action": true,
   "waiting_for_us": true,
   "last_synced": "2026-02-15T09:52:50Z",
-  "notes": ""
+  "notes": "AI triage (gemini): The issue likely concerns a bug in the handling, storage, or utilization of the Remote Desktop Gateway password during connection establishment or configuration management.\nApproach: Investigate the lifecycle of the RDGatewayPassword, from UI input and storage/retrieval in configuration (XML/SQL) to its final application in the RDP connection protocol, and develop unit tests to validate the fix."
 }
